title: Beyond chatbots: How AI agents built a full OS, web apps, and more
summary: Google Cloud Tech showcases long-running AI agents executing multi-day engineering pipelines to build software artifacts including a desktop OS and 3D web applications. Addy Osmani discusses agentic AI capabilities beyond simple chatbots and basic automation use cases.
